content.text:
*long pause*

Something that was just... mine. 

I don't know how to describe it without sounding dramatic. It wasn't like I was a different person up there, it was more like I was the same person, just — uninterrupted. I could finish a thought. I could start a book and finish it in the same sitting because nobody needed anything.

*voice quieter*

I think I lost the version of me that knew what she liked. What I liked. I've been so busy knowing what everyone else needs that I'm not sure I could tell you, right now, what I actually enjoy. Besides that. Besides the mountains.

*small, slightly embarrassed laugh*

That sounds like something you'd say in a therapy session. Sorry. But it's true.
